summary: Complete E2E testing of Noah Kozlowski Portfolio Admin Panel - All tests PASSED (22 backend + 10 frontend flows)

minor.issue: bcrypt version warning in logs (trapped, non-blocking)

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to AdminLogin.jsx form elements for better test automation (username input, password input, submit button, error message)
Add data-testid attributes to AdminDashboard.jsx tabs and manager components
Consider adding data-testid to Contact form on public site for E2E testing
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on key interactive elements (login form inputs, dashboard tabs, save buttons)
React useEffect dependency warnings in admin components (AboutManager, SkillsManager, etc.) - eslint-disable or add deps
sectionRef.current warning in multiple components - should copy ref to variable inside effect

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 10 flows passed: login, 5 tabs, logout, protected routes, form submissions)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed data for about, contact sections - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin CRUD APIs working. Frontend admin dashboard functional with 5 tabs (About, Skills, Services, Contact, Messages). Login/logout flow working. Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users. Public portfolio site loads correctly with all sections. Contact form submissions work and appear in Messages tab.

frontend: Dashboard loads with all 5 tabs visible
About tab - content form loads with saved data
Skills tab - add skill form and current skills list
Services tab - add service form and current services list
Contact tab - contact info form with social media links
Messages tab - displays contact form submissions (5 messages)
Logout - clears session and redirects to login
Protected route - /admin/dashboard redirects to login when not authenticated
